name: PaymentIcon
description: 8 fixed payment/bill-category icons, each with a pinned icon+color pairing: water (teal), gas (red), electricity (yellow), donate (pink), internet (blue), phone (orange), rent (green), tax (purple).
sourceNote: Ported 1:1 from Figma's 8-type variant set; each type's icon+color pairing is semantically fixed (not independently configurable), matching the source component's design intent.
